title: Colourful OreUI
description: This OreUI inspired GUI re-texture brings Minecraft's interface to life. Featuring a premium gradient finish, fluid animations & colourful elements...🔥⛏️
body:
![Colourful OreUI Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a827355ff31b3fd10eb41e6ea23240b674004a5.png) Do you want an experience where you’re not greeted by the same grey interface every time you open a container? If so, **Colourful OreUI** is for you. This pack changes practically every GUI and UI element in minecraft, featuring; **fluid animations**, **polished**, **premium gradient finish**, **fresh boss bars** and **fresh shader panorama's** for each version. Oh, and a whole load more that brings colour and life to Minecraft’s UI.🔥⛏️
📅Upcoming Releases: ### A Colourful OreUI Movie will be released on Friday 10th of July 2026: - A cinematic way to promote Colourful OreUI ### The full release of Colourful OreUI 2.1 will be released in July of 2026: - RespackOpts support to have the option to change the hotbar style & panorama background - Adding core shaders to add extra small details (and possibly animations) - New beacon pulsating animation - New smithing and anvil light sweep animation on the hammer - New furnace fire animation - More pixel consistency across some GUIs - Adding gradients to some container sprites that do not have gradients in the BETA version - Adding the Camel Husk GUI and Nautilus GUI - Overhauling the animal GUIs to be completely different and unique, each with its own theme depending on what animal that GUI corresponds too - A version of Colourful OreUI with a non-specific gamedrop theme, just a general minecraft theme panorma and title with shaders (for versions 1.19.4 – 1.21.3, as one version) - Adding support for version 26.1 & 26.2 - Adding a unique panorama and title for the Tiny Takeover game-drop version - Adding a unique panorama and title for the Chaos Cubed game-drop version - Adding the Pale Garden panorama and title to 1.21.4 as a separate version - Adding more detail to the projects description and fully finishing the projects gallery ### Colourful Panoramas & Titles will be released as seperate packs in July of 2026: - Taking Colourful OreUI panoramas and title screens from each version and making them available as standalone packs ### Loons' Enhanced World Discord server will be released in July of 2026: - A discord server were everyone can chat, share there projects and videos, get updates on my YouTube channel (Mr Gaming Loons), and request any help needed with my creations, like resourse packs and modpacks. ### Loons' Vanilla Enchanced Beta 3.0 Modpack will be released in July of 2026: - A modpack that features Colourful OreUI, with extra UI enhancements to help Colourful OreUI look even better, and in-game world enhancements to make Minecraft look the very best, while keeping everything vanilla, only changing visual aspects of the Minecraft game. ### Colourful OreUI Dark will be released in August of 2026: - Colourful OreUI, but the inventory containers and menu buttons will be darker ### Colourful OreUI Villager Variants Add-On will be released in September of 2026: - Villager variants for the villager trading GUIs, to match with vanilla tweaks villager variants

🛠️For full features, the following mods are required:

## 💡Inspiration: - **All GUIs are based off of the block that they correspond too** - [**AR’s OreUI**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ars-oreui) by amongstreality - [**Re-colourful Containers GUI + HUD**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/recolourful-containers-gui) by Vi_Tul - [**Colourful containers GUI**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/colourful-containers-gui) by Kingybu - [**Ore UI-ify**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/oreui-ify) by BoardSodie - [**Unique Dark**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/unique-dark) by amongstreality - [**Ingot UI**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ingotui) by Zeit709 - [**GUI Revision**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gui-revision) by Vixel - Colorful Containers OreUI **(Never Released)** by Springfall - OreUI by Mojang Studios
📜Terms Of Use: If you think that you can’t do something with this pack, please ask me through **Discord** before proceeding! - **Display Name:** Mr.Loons - **Username:** official.mr.loons **🟩What you can do:** - Include this pack in a free mod pack - Include this pack in your private server - Modify this pack **(for personal use only)** - Use this pack in any forms of media, including YouTube, Twitch, etc - Create add-ons or mod support, as long as you credit this pack and link back to it **🟥What you can't do:** - Redistribute this pack or its assets **(original or modified)** on any platform without my explicit consent - Lock this pack or its contents behind a paywall **(e.g. Patreon-exclusive access)**
### _Hope you enjoy the new user interface._ 😁
